raw_responses.title: Speculative Decoding with Draft Model (2023/2)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: small draft model proposes tokens, large model verifies.

raw_responses.title: Speculative Sampling (2023/5)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: parallel sampling acceleration with smaller draft model.

raw_responses.title: Routing-Based Cascading LLM (2025/4)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: routing between models of different sizes.

raw_responses.title: Coupled Auxiliary Network Embedded in Transformer Residual (2025/9)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: auxiliary network whose outputs are summed into transformer residual at multiple layers; jointly trained with main model.

raw_responses.title: Obligately Co-Trained Dual-Model Inference (2026/3)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: two models trained as obligate inference pair; main model factual layers replaced by auxiliary model outputs.

raw_responses.title: Tightly-Coupled Specialist Embedding via Residual Stream (2025/11)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: specialist model embedded in generalist residual stream.

raw_responses.title: Composite Two-Model Architecture for Domain-Specialist LLM (2026/4)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: composite of generalist + domain-specialist; both required at inference.
